drivers.notes: Vented; Hybrid Cross-Section Expanded Tractrix horn

description.en: Slim two-way floorstander of the Reference Premiere II line — Klipsch's 1" titanium LTS tweeter in a vented Hybrid Cross-Section Tractrix horn paired with twin 5.25" Cerametallic woofers with Faraday rings, in an internally-braced MDF cabinet vented through dual rear Tractrix ports. 95 dB sensitivity, 400 W peak.
description.es: Floorstander esbelto de dos vías de la línea Reference Premiere II — tweeter LTS de titanio de 1" de Klipsch en un horn Tractrix Hybrid Cross-Section ventilado junto a dos woofers Cerametallic de 5,25" con anillos Faraday, en un gabinete MDF reforzado con doble puerto trasero Tractrix. 95 dB de sensibilidad y 400 W de pico.
